name: vim-leader-key
title: Vim Leader Key - Keyboard Shortcut Sequences
description: Vim-style keyboard shortcut sequences for launching apps, running commands, and triggering actions
author: akshay_k

commands.name: leader-key
commands.title: Leader Key
commands.description: Activate leader key mode to trigger actions with key sequences

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.description: Capture the current app, URL, folder, or path as a Leader Key shortcut

commands.name: import-config
commands.title: Import Config
commands.description: Import a Leader Key config.json file

commands.name: export-config
commands.title: Export Config
commands.description: Export your config as a Leader Key compatible JSON file

preferences.name: enableTimeout
preferences.title: Auto-Reset Timeout
preferences.description: Automatically reset to root menu after a period of inactivity
preferences.label: Enable timeout

preferences.name: timeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Timeout Duration
preferences.description: Seconds of inactivity before resetting (2.5 - 6 seconds)

preferences.name: openUrlsInActiveBrowser
preferences.title: Open URLs in Active Browser
preferences.description: Open URL shortcuts in the active browser instead of the configured or default browser when a browser is active
preferences.label: Open URLs in active browser

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
